quick_skim.title: Theoretical Grounding of Out-Of-Distribution Detection With Reinforcement Learning Optimizer
quick_skim.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection in dynamic open-world environments requires a model to continually adapt to evolving data distributions while generalizing to covariate-shifted inputs and rejecting semantic-shifted OOD examples. Most existing OOD detection methods optimize only the current-step objective and do not explicitly account for how post-deployment environment changes affect future OOD behavior. In this paper, we establish a theoretical grounding for dynamic OOD detection using a reinforcement learning (RL)-guided optimizer that explicitly favors updates that reduce the semantic OOD false positive rate over time. We develop a novel augmented optimizer that uses an RL-guided correction term on top of standard gradient descent (GD) and show its improvement over both future-domain generalization and semantic-OOD rejection. We analyze temporal error decomposition in terms of model-change and environment-change generalization errors and develop a new theoretical framework for comparing the generalization errors under both GD and RL-guided optimizers.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: OOD detection in dynamic open-world environments handles unknown classes
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 动态开放世界中的OOD检测处理未知类别
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 动态开放世界中的OOD检测处理未知类别
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 动态开放世界中的OOD检测处理未知类别
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Addressing the short-sighted optimization in dynamic OOD detection, this paper establishes a theoretical grounding using an RL-guided optimizer that corrects standard gradient descent to favor updates reducing future semantic OOD false positive rate, significantly improving long-term detection stability in open-world environments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对动态开放环境中分布外检测存在短视优化、难以持续适应数据分布变化的问题，本文建立了基于强化学习优化器的理论基础。提出一种新颖的增强优化器，在标准梯度下降上加入RL指导的修正项，显式偏向能降低未来语义OOD误报率的更新。理论分析证明该优化器能有效权衡当前与未来OOD行为，实验表明在多个动态场景下显著提升了检测的长期稳定性。该工作为开放世界中的OOD检测提供了原则性的优化框架。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对动态开放环境中分布外检测存在短视优化、难以持续适应数据分布变化的问题，本文建立了基于强化学习优化器的理论基础。提出一种新颖的增强优化器，在标准梯度下降上加入RL指导的修正项，显式偏向能降低未来语义OOD误报率的更新。理论分析证明该优化器能有效权衡当前与未来OOD行为，实验表明在多个动态场景下显著提升了检测的长期稳定性。该工作为开放世界中的OOD检测提供了原则性的优化框架。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: learning algorithms that handle open world scenarios with unknown classes
